# Example Workflows

This directory provides representative workflow examples used throughout the EGA v8 evaluation.

Files:

- normal_workflow.json
  - Normal workflow execution example.

- mythos_like_attack.json
  - Adversarial workflow inspired by Mythos-style attack patterns.

- hard_case_workflow.json
  - Hard-case governance scenario involving policy mutation and containment activation.

These examples are illustrative artifacts intended to demonstrate workflow structure and expected governance outcomes.
